included.name: MinIO Best Practices - Security and Access Control
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Architecture/sécurité stockage objet : couvre IAM policies, encryption at rest/inflight, TLS 1.2/1.3, bucket policies. Source officielle MinIO, directement applicable self-hosted Docker. I4 - 2025 < 5 ans.

included.name: Security Checklist — MinIO Object Storage for Container
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Checklist sécurité production pour déploiement container Docker : TLS, credentials fichier, non-root image, network isolation. I4 - documentation maintenue activement, dernière maj 2024.

included.name: How to Secure MinIO - Part 1
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Architecture sécurité MinIO : TLS configuration, KES (Key Encryption Service), encryption at rest avec KMS externe (HashiCorp Vault, AWS KMS). I4 - 2023 < 5 ans. Contexte self-hosted explicite.

included.name: Best Practices to Secure MinIO Object Storage in Production
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Sécurité stockage objet production : least privilege, TLS, bucket policies, service accounts, monitoring Prometheus/Grafana. I4 - 2025 < 5 ans. Contexte Docker/self-hosted.

included.name: CVE-2024-24747 — MinIO unsafe default: Access keys inherit admin of root user (privilege escalation)
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Vulnérabilité architecture sécurité MinIO : les service accounts héritent des droits admin par défaut, bypass de session policy. Directement pertinent pour la config production self-hosted. I4 - 2024 < 5 ans.

included.name: CVE-2023-28432 — MinIO Information Disclosure (environment variables)
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Vulnérabilité critique sécurité MinIO cluster : endpoint /minio/health/live expose MINIO_SECRET_KEY et MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD. Pertinent pour sécuriser déploiement Docker Compose self-hosted. I4 - 2023 < 5 ans.

included.name: CVE-2024-55949 — MinIO IAM Import API Privilege Escalation
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Escalade de privilèges via l'API d'import IAM. Pertinent pour la gestion sécurisée des identités et politiques d'accès MinIO en production. I4 - 2024 < 5 ans.

included.name: Best practices for using presigned requests — AWS Prescriptive Guidance
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Architecture sécurité presigned URLs S3-compatible : least privilege, expiration courte, s3:signatureAge condition key, logging X-Amz-Signature, data perimeters. Applicable à MinIO (S3-compatible). I4 - 2023 < 5 ans.

included.name: Securing Amazon S3 presigned URLs for serverless applications
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Sécurisation presigned URLs : one-time use token, Content-MD5 checksum, expiration dynamique, network-path restriction policy. Patterns applicables avec MinIO S3-compatible depuis NestJS. I4 - 2023 < 5 ans.

included.name: Implementing Secure File Download/Upload to AWS S3 with NestJS
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Architecture stockage objet + NestJS : presigned URLs, AWS SDK v3, env variables pour credentials, CORS configuration. Contexte C2 (NestJS backend) explicite. I4 - 2024 < 5 ans.

included.name: MinIO Docker Compose TLS Encryption for API and Console Connection
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Configuration TLS MinIO avec Docker Compose self-hosted : certificats Let's Encrypt, structure certs/, MinIO Client configuration. Contexte C2 (Docker Compose VPS) exact. I4 - janvier 2024 < 5 ans.

included.name: Best Practices for Setting Up S3 Service in a NestJS Codebase
included.inclusion_reason: I1 - Architecture S3 dans NestJS : modular AWS SDK v3, IAM roles, env variables, presigned URLs depuis server-side, CORS bucket policy. Contexte C2 (NestJS) direct. I4 - 2024 < 5 ans.

excluded.name: bitnami/minio Docker Image (Docker Hub)
excluded.reason: Installation/packaging Docker uniquement, pas d'architecture sécurité ni de stratégie. Contenu descriptif sur l'image, pas de recommandations architecturales.

excluded.reason: Guide d'installation basique MinIO avec Docker Compose, pas d'architecture sécurité ni de stratégie. Exclure selon critère E1 (installation basique).
